refactorItems.change: Remove 'load_latent_upscale_model' from __all__ — it is a method of ModelManager, not a standalone module-level function. The orphan entry would cause AttributeError on 'from comfy_diffusion.models import *'.

Replace test_load_latent_upscale_model_in_module_all (only checked string presence in __all__) with test_load_latent_upscale_model_accessible_via_model_manager (verifies method callable on ModelManager and that ModelManager is in __all__).
